title: mentha × rotundifolia var. velutina
intro: Mentha × rotundifolia var. velutina, also known as Woolly Mint, is a variety of the peppermint plant with a soft, velvety texture and a distinctive minty fragrance. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its ability to ease digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural antiseptic. The health benefits of Woolly Mint include relief from nausea, headaches, and menstrual cramps, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve respiratory health. Woolly Mint can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and topical creams, making it a versatile and valuable addition to natural remedies.
